item.name: Gordian Chest Gear Coffer (IL 210)
item.description:
A thick chest containing a piece of Gordian attire.

Required level: 60. IL: 210. Chest gear type determined by current job or class at time of opening. Cannot be opened in instanced areas such as dungeons, PvP areas, or raids.

obj.n: Alexander - The Burden of the Father (Savage)
